name: trace_component_shape_protection
description: v2.6.1 U1 selection integrity (SR-SHP-01..03 / SR-IXC-19/21 / UF-07). Natively selects a chart CHILD (task bar) and asserts it is suppressed within one tick with CHART_ROOT/nothing left as PowerPoint's real selection while the overlay ownSel mirrors the item (no_child_shape_selected). Then checks Delete/arrow hotkeys are scoped to slide-view focus and a Delete delivered while focus is off does not mutate (hotkey_scope_respected). Finally deselects and asserts the app bar reverts to the component/SCALE context (context_reset_to_component).
